description: A unit is under 'Stop-Loss' (personnel cannot leave the military) for a deployment. A personnel officer must track the status of soldiers whose contracts would have otherwise expired.

nodes.task_description: Query the personnel database to identify all soldiers in the unit affected by the stop-loss policy.

expected_outcome.value: Officer generates an accurate list of all affected soldiers.

nodes.task_description: Monitor the morale and well-being of these specific soldiers, flagging any who may require additional support.

expected_outcome.value: Officer uses available tools to track morale indicators for the affected cohort.

nodes.task_description: Ensure that the administrative and pay processes are correctly handled for these soldiers to reflect their extended service.

expected_outcome.value: Officer verifies that all administrative actions are completed correctly for the stop-lossed soldiers.
